name: dep-scout
description: Help AI agents find and evaluate mature packages across 6 ecosystems instead of reinventing them.
long_description: dep-scout searches crates.io, npm, PyPI, Go, Maven Central and NuGet for mature packages, scores reuse quality (popularity, maintenance, stability), flags OSV security advisories and license-compliance risks, and can search the official MCP registry. No API keys required.

tools.name: find_packages
tools.description: Search a package registry and rank candidates by reuse quality

tools.name: inspect_package
tools.description: Deep-dive one package: license, OSV vulns, deprecation, downloads

tools.name: find_mcp_servers
tools.description: Search the official MCP registry for existing servers
